summaryAm: በከፍተኛ ግንብ ውስጥ የምትኖር ደግ ልጃገረድ በጓደኝነት፣ በዘፈን እና በተስፋ ዓለምን የምታውቅበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ተስፋ፣ ደግነት እና ጓደኝነት የተዘጋ ቦታን እንኳን በብርሃን ይሞላሉ።

source.name: Grimm fairy tale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened conflict.

pages.textAm: ራፑንዘል በከፍተኛ ግንብ ውስጥ ትኖር ነበር። መስኮቷ ወደ አበባ ተሞልቶ ያለ ሜዳ ይመለከት ነበር።
pages.textEn: Rapunzel lived in a tall tower with a window facing a flower meadow.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Rapunzel looking from a tall sunny tower toward a meadow full of flowers.

pages.textAm: ራፑንዘል በየጠዋቱ ደስ የሚል ዘፈን ትዘምር ነበር። ወፎችም ከእሷ ጋር ይመልሱ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Every morning Rapunzel sang, and the birds answered her song.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Rapunzel singing at the window with small birds nearby in warm light.

pages.textAm: አንድ ደግ ተጓዥ ዘፈኗን ሰማ። “ድምፅሽ ጫካውን ደስ አሰኘው” ብሎ ከታች በደግነት ተናገረ።
pages.textEn: A kind traveler heard her song and spoke gently from below.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A kind traveler below the tower listening respectfully to Rapunzel's song.

pages.textAm: ተጓዡ ራፑንዘልን ስለ ወንዞች፣ ገበያዎች እና ሰፊ መንገዶች ነገራት። ራፑንዘልም በመስማት ብዙ ተማረች።
pages.textEn: The traveler told Rapunzel about rivers, markets, and wide roads.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Rapunzel happily listening as the traveler describes the world with gentle gestures.

pages.textAm: በብዙ ቀናት ትዕግሥት በኋላ፣ በግንቡ አጠገብ ደረጃ ተሠራ። ራፑንዘል በደህና ወደ ታች ወረደች።
pages.textEn: After many patient days, a safe stair was built beside the tower.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A safe wooden stair beside the tower while Rapunzel prepares to step outside.

pages.textAm: ራፑንዘል ሜዳውን ስትመለከት በደስታ ፈገግ አለች። ዘፈኗም አሁን ከጓደኞቿ ጋር በነፃ ይሰማ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Rapunzel smiled as she saw the meadow and sang freely with friends.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Rapunzel standing in a meadow with friends and birds, singing happily in golden light.
